rawOutput:
<Form>
  <Column>
    <Text variant="heading">联系我们</Text>
    <Input bind="contactName" placeholder="姓名" required />
    <Input type="email" bind="contactEmail" placeholder="邮箱" required />
    <Input type="number" bind="contactPhone" placeholder="电话" />
    <Input bind="contactMessage" placeholder="留言" required />
    <Button variant="primary" onTap="sendMessage">发送</Button>
  </Column>
</Form>
